mapper.insert: insert into task_execution_attempts() values(#{attempt.executionAttemptId},#{attempt.taskId},#{attempt.assignmentId},#{attempt.dispatchAttemptId},#{attempt.agentId},#{attempt.agentSessionId},#{attempt.leaseId},#{attempt.fencingToken},#{attempt.attemptNo},#{attempt.status},#{attempt.resultCode},#{attempt.errorCode},#{attempt.errorMessage},#{attempt.callbackId},#{attempt.createdAt},#{attempt.startedAt},#{attempt.completedAt},#{attempt.updatedAt}) on conflict(execution_attempt_id) do update set status=excluded.status,result_code=excluded.result_code,error_code=excluded.error_code,error_message=excluded.error_message,callback_id=excluded.callback_id,fencing_token=excluded.fencing_token,started_at=excluded.started_at,completed_at=excluded.completed_at,updated_at=excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select from task_execution_attempts where assignment_id=#{assignmentId} and status in('CREATED','RUNNING') order by created_at desc limit 1
select from task_execution_attempts where task_id=#{taskId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from task_execution_attempts where task_id=#{taskId}
